title: zephyranthes montana
intro: Zephyranthes montana, also known as the mountain zephyr lily, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Zephyranthes montana include its ability to help alleviate coughs, reduce fever, and improve breathing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
